name: Tatung Fine Chemicals Co.
summary: Tatung Fine Chemicals Co. develops, manufactures, and sells nano-products in Taiwan. The company offers aqueous concentrated pigment dispersions for ink-jet inks and photo-catalyst paints. It also provides lithium iron phosphate, a cathode material for high power lithium ion batteries, as well as vanish, ink, TiO, and acrylic CED products. The company was formerly known as Tatung Coatings Company and changed its name to Tatung Fine Chemicals Co. in 2003. Tatung Fine Chemicals Co. was founded in 1970 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
